category_sources: source_facts.description says livereload is a local web server in Python; official docs describe automatic browser reload for web development.
display_name_sources: Official documentation title is LiveReload and describes the Python LiveReload package; source_facts.homepage points to lepture/python-livereload.
docs_sources: Official Python LiveReload ReadTheDocs site provides installation, CLI, and API documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official lepture/python-livereload GitHub repository, and source_facts.repo is empty.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a Python local web server; official docs describe watching files and reloading pages for web developers.
